cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Namaste Nandini ji! This is Rohan from Barclays Bank. How are you today, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm doing well, thank you. What's this call about, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, we've noticed a recent transaction on your account. I just need to confirm a few details with you, Thik hai?
